strengths: Deep full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React with production experience building systems at scale
Proven ability to architect and deliver complete platforms from database to UI across multiple industries
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with TDD, CI/CD, and experience mentoring other developers
concerns: Significant overqualification: candidate is Staff/Senior level for a Junior/Mid individual contributor role
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience; most work uses MongoDB, DLang, or non-relational databases
No mention of required AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3, SQS) or Kubernetes experience
response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional full-stack capabilities and strong command of core technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React), this represents severe overqualification for a Junior/Mid-level position. A Staff engineer with 15+ years of experience and current employment at that level would likely not engage with an entry-to-mid individual contributor role and presents significant flight risk. The technical fit is strong, but the career-stage mismatch is fundamentally problematic.
